title: How to remove dark background in Cursor IDE
author: Demodogo
text:
I'm trying the new Cursor IDE (based on VS Code)...and it "highlights" like every piece of code separately with a dark bg (based on my theme I suppose), but it doesn't really make it easier for me as I'm not used to it...it actually confuses me. So...anyone knows how to remove this? (See pictures)
1 Answer
That's probably coming from the leodevbro.blockman
extension. Just disable it or uninstall it.
